title: Multimodal UAV data for individual tree species classification in a complexly structured, species-rich riparian forest
author: Mihatsch, Noah
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository contains data for the complemented study "Multimodal UAV data for individual tree species classification in a complexly structured, species-rich riparian forest". Data included contains: 
 
 CSV-files of the extracted features from all time steps and sensor types used (OM refers to Orthomsaic and PC to Point Cloud) 
 R-code for feature extraction and RF architecture
